Overview

Conducted a detailed review of the structural design to identify optimization opportunities. Through slab and foundation redesign, reinforcement rationalization, and structural verification, the project achieved substantial material savings, including 205 m³.of concrete and 122 tons of steel reinforcement, while preserving all serviceability and strength requirements. ECP 203.
